description: Add a unit regression test in packages/pi-beadwork-extension covering the delegated landing path when landing.review.enabled=true and worktrees.cleanup=cleanup-after-landing, asserting reviewer approval is required before merge and cleanup only happens after successful landing.

comments.text:
Added the combined regression test in `packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/unit/orchestrator.test.ts` and committed it as `d7c8c36` (`test(pi-beadwork-extension): cover reviewer gating before cleanup-after-landing`).

Coverage added:
- explicit delegated landing request with `landing.review.enabled = true`
- worker `cleanupPolicy = "cleanup-after-landing"`
- asserts reviewer starts first, merge-back does not happen while review is pending, and cleanup only runs after merge verification
- verifies final registry state is landed + cleaned and runtime artifacts are removed

Validation run clean:
- `npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`
- `npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension`

title: Add combined regression test for reviewer gating with cleanup-after-landing in delegated landing flow
